stimulus: Cuban-American poet Lourdes Casal's Palabras Juntan Revolución (1981), a collection of bilingual verses meditating on exile and return, ______ readers' appreciation of the complex emotional landscape of Cuban diasporic literature in the late twentieth century.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice C is the best answer. The convention being tested is subject-verb agreement. The singular verb "has deepened" agrees in number with the singular subject "Palabras Juntan Revolución," which is the title of a single book of poems.

Choice A is incorrect because the plural verb "are deepening" does not agree in number with the singular subject. Choice B is incorrect because the plural verb "have deepened" does not agree in number with the singular subject. Choice D is incorrect because the plural verb "deepen" does not agree in number with the singular subject.
